name: Haven: Location
description: Each dot adds +1 die to hunting checks. More dots place the haven near prime feeding grounds — clubs, shelters, hospitals — anywhere prey is plentiful and distracted.

name: Haven: Size
description: ●Small apartment or chamber (1-2 rooms). ●●Large apartment or small home (3-4 rooms). ●●●Warehouse, church or large home (5-8 rooms). ●●●●Abandoned mansion or subway tunnels (9-15 rooms). ●●●●●Sprawling estate or vast tunnel network.

name: Haven: Security
description: Each dot subtracts one die from intruder dice pools and grants +1 Initiative to anyone defending from inside. Represents locks, surveillance, hidden entrances, or fortification.

name: Herd
description: A group of mortals who supply blood with little difficulty. Each dot adds +1 die to feeding rolls. Herds are not perfectly reliable — they require occasional maintenance and are never fully under a vampire's control.

name: Status: City
description: Standing among the Kindred of the domain. ●Hound or rising star. ●●Sheriff or accomplished individual. ●●●Harpy, Seneschal or Master of Elysium. ●●●●Regent, Primogen or Herald. ●●●●●Prince or true paragon. Adds dots to social rolls within the domain.

name: Status: Clan
description: Standing within your own clan only — a Nosferatu cannot hold Gangrel Clan Status. Adds dots to social rolls with clan members. Reflects deeds and reputation within the bloodline.

name: Status: Covenant
description: Standing within a covenant. Required to access covenant benefits (Crúac, Theban Sorcery, Invictus merit discounts, etc.). Maximum 3 dots total across all covenants. ●Known to a select few. ●●Recognized by most in the city. ●●●Known across neighboring domains.
